---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or workflow
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What Metabase or MCP workflow should this improve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the tool, resource, prompt, or documentation change you want.

## Safety Considerations

Does this read data, create/update content, perform admin work, or delete/archive anything?

## Alternatives

Can this be handled today through `metabase_api_request`?
